resourceConfig.label: Resource Configuration
resourceConfig.helpText: See the full instructions on the app's README for details on how to configure resources. Drag the lower right corner of this field on desktop to expand it for easier editing.

backupToWiki.label: Backup to wiki page
backupToWiki.helpText: If enabled, resources will be backed up to a public wiki page on old.reddit with the name "resource-reply" (visibility can be set manually to mod-only if needed). To trigger a backup, simply select "Reply with resource" from a post or comment and load the form.

pinReply.label: Allow users to pin resources
pinReply.helpText: If enabled, users will be able to pin a resource reply to a post if they're replying directly to it.

lockReply.label: Lock all replies
lockReply.helpText: If enabled, all resource replies will be locked to prevent further replies. This would prevent users from being able to delete their resource replies with the "!delete" command.

anonymizeMods.label: Anonymize moderators
anonymizeMods.helpText: If enabled, moderator usernames will be hidden when suggesting resources.

allowRepliesToMods.label: Allow users to reply to mods
allowRepliesToMods.helpText: If enabled, users can reply directly to mods with resources. Mods can still reply anywhere.

allowOnModSubmissions.label: Allow users to reply anywhere on mod posts
allowOnModSubmissions.helpText: If enabled, users can reply to comments in mod posts with resources. Mods can still reply anywhere. You could disable this for announcement posts, for example.
